settings.show_state_text.label: Show state text
settings.show_state_text.description: Display the state name (idle, recording, transcribing) next to the glyph. Off by default; the glyph alone is usually enough.
settings.transcript_preview_length.label: Transcript preview length
settings.transcript_preview_length.descr: Maximum characters of the last transcript to show on hover. Reserved for a future release; not yet wired to a live transcript cache.
